title: Doing trust tax returns for the deceased estate
description: When and how to lodge a trust tax return, income to include, how tax applies, how to get a TFN and ABN, and tax rates.
keywords: Deceased estate trust tax return, managing deceased estate, deceased estate beneficiary entitlement

child_links.title: Deductibility of legal personal representative legal costs
child_links.description: Check if legal costs you incur as the legal personal representative (LPR) are deductible.
